title: Printable/offline worksheet pack (PDF)
context: Patient advocates often work in settings without reliable internet access — paper copies of worksheets are a key accessibility feature. This task builds a CI step that generates a bundled printable PDF pack of all worksheets (RCT, early-phase, observational, SR/MA) from the Markdown source, with 'not medical advice' notices and CC-BY attribution included in the print layout.
objective: Build and merge a CI step that generates a printable PDF worksheet pack from the Markdown worksheet sources, including all study-type worksheets, 'not medical advice' notices, and CC-BY attribution.
acceptanceCriteria: CI generates a bundled PDF containing all completed worksheets (task 007 RCT, 201 early-phase, 202 observational, 203 SR/MA) from Markdown source on each build.
Each worksheet in the PDF is clearly titled, includes the 'education only — not medical advice' notice, and carries a CC-BY-4.0 attribution footer.
PDF is printer-friendly: clean layout, adequate font size (>= 11pt), sufficient line spacing, and print margins suitable for A4 and US Letter.
Generated PDF is committed as a release artefact or linked from the site; instructions for downloading and printing are in the site's accessibility section.
Build step is idempotent and does not require manual steps.
Maintainer + Advocate review sign-off recorded (Advocate confirms usability of the printed format).
resources: PLAN.md (§ Scope — printable/offline worksheets; § Success metrics — Metric 8)
output: A merged PR adding a CI step that generates a printable PDF worksheet pack from Markdown source, with 'not medical advice' notices and CC-BY attribution, produced on every build.
